Description:
Pulls all contacts who have an ACL preference and have opened or clicked anemail in the past 549 days (18 months). Next all the future shows they purchased tickets for are added to the ACL_Events_Already_Bought DE. Finally looking at their genre affinity and shows already bought and adds recommended shows for the email that are more than 30 days in the fututre. 

If a contact has no genre affinity then no shows will be reccomended. This will be flagged and the next show after 30 days will be added to the recommendation.
Fixes Implemented Or Needed: With the fallback recommendation queries the data intended on being pulled was not being querie correctly. If no recommendations are added the show_recommendation field is set to FALSE but when looking for records it looks for that field to be TRUE, causing 10s of thousands of contacts to not be send newsletter emails because no recs are added. I have fixed the query so now those contacts will have recs.

I will setup a international invalid phone checker in the fututre. 

Updated Step 2 to look at the new Cleaned_Mobile_Phone field added to step one. This matched many more area codes in the Valid_Area_Codes DE

Step 3 added modified date to AllContacts_Step1 update

add_recs_to_Ryman_Subscribers
Description:
This automation generates our Ryman Show reccommendation email by pulling all Ryman subscribers, gathering the shows they already purchased and looking at subgenre, genre, expressed genre in that order to generate 3 show recommendations. It is done in that order because it takes the lowest valued genre first and overwrites as genres hold more weight to that contact. If no genre is know random future shows are added. 

Step 1: Overwrites Ryman_Newsletter_Show_Recommendation DE with all emails from the Ryman_Subscriber_Share DE.

Step 2: Pulls in all shows that the Ryman subscribers have already purchased a ticket for.

Step 3-5: Looks at the subgenre affinity of all emails and provides 3 future not shold out shows that match those genres. 

Step 6-14: Looks at the genre affinity of all emails and provides 3 future not shold out shows that match those genres.

Step 15-17: Looks at the expressed genre affinity of all emails and provides 3 future not shold out shows that match those genres. 

Step 18: Flags all records that no show recommendations have been added.

Step 19-21: Finds all records with out any reccomendation and add any 3 future shows.
Fixes Implemented Or Needed:
Updated the last 3 steps. For all emails that do not have a genre to recommend a show, those emails are supposed to be pulled in and given a show 30+ days in the future. The way the query was setup it was not pulling those records causing 200k+ emails to not have any show reccommended. Then added a clause to not recoomend the same shows for all the steps.

Updated the final step to change the show_recommendation value to true if a generic show  has been added.

Work with Paul about a better recommendation for no genre emails.
